_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromatosis type 2 tumor suppressor protein is expressed in oligodendrocytes and regulates cell proliferation and process formation.

_contextSnippet: However, the 70 kDa band of Merlin was absent in SC4 cells in which Merlin is more prominently degraded due to a deletion of exon 2 and 3
details: 70 kDa Merlin band was absent, instead showing a smaller and weaker band corresponding to exon composition missing exons 2 and 3
